example_prompt: Handle incoming SMS messages sent to your Africa's Talking shortcode.

date.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the message was received.

linkId.description: Only present for on-demand premium SMS responses. Pass this value in the linkId field of send_premium_sms when replying.

text.description: Message content sent by the user.

to.description: Your registered shortcode that received the message.

cost.description: Cost of the message in the format 'KES 1.00' (currency code + space + decimal amount).

networkCode.description: Telco network code of the sender.

gotchas: Configure the incoming messages callback URL in the AT dashboard, not in the API call. Africa's Talking strongly recommends this webhook over the fetch_messages polling endpoint.
linkId is only present for on-demand premium SMS — use its value in the linkId field of send_premium_sms when replying to the user's on-demand request.
